answer: Netlify offers a self-serve Free tier that includes API access as part of its standard platform features [1]. The Free plan provides 300 credits per month for various services, including deployments, compute resources, and API-related activities [1][2]. You can deploy from Git or via the API without requiring a credit card [1][3]. If you exceed your monthly credit limit, your projects will pause until the next billing cycle, or you can manually upgrade to a paid plan to restore service [4][5].
